data.name: GenericError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: Unauthorized
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this operation.

data.name: ProviderNotFound
data.value: Provider not found.

data.name: QualificationAddError
data.value: An error occurred while adding the qualification.

data.name: CorrectionReasonRequired
data.value: Correction reason is required.

data.name: RequestedByRequired
data.value: RequestedBy is required.

data.name: BasicInfoCorrectionError
data.value: Failed to require basic info correction.

data.name: VerificationStatusUpdateError
data.value: An error occurred while updating the verification status.

data.name: ServiceValidationFailed
data.value: Failed to validate service: {0}

data.name: ServiceNotFound
data.value: Service {0} does not exist.

data.name: ServiceInactive
data.value: Service {0} is not active.

data.name: ServiceDetailsRetrievalFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve service details.

data.name: ProviderRejectionReasonRequired
data.value: Rejection reason is required.

data.name: RejectedByRequired
data.value: Rejection responsible party is required.

data.name: SuspensionReasonRequired
data.value: Suspension reason is required.

data.name: SuspendedByRequired
data.value: Suspension responsible party is required.

data.name: QualificationNotFound
data.value: Qualification not found.

data.name: ProviderDocumentNotFound
data.value: Document of type {0} not found for provider {1}.

data.name: CategoryIdRequired
data.value: Category ID cannot be empty.

data.name: CategoryNotFoundById
data.value: Category with ID '{0}' not found.

data.name: CategoryActivateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while activating the service category.

data.name: CategoryDeactivateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while deactivating the service category.

data.name: CategoryDeleteError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while deleting the service category.

data.name: CategoryUpdateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the service category.

data.name: ServiceIdRequired
data.value: Service ID cannot be empty.

data.name: ServiceNotFoundById
data.value: Service with ID '{0}' not found.

data.name: ServiceActivateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while activating the service.

data.name: ServiceDeactivateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while deactivating the service.

data.name: ServiceDeleteError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while deleting the service.

data.name: ServiceUpdateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the service.

data.name: NewCategoryIdRequired
data.value: New category ID cannot be empty.

data.name: CannotMoveToInactiveCategory
data.value: Cannot move service to an inactive category.

data.name: ServiceNameExistsInCategory
data.value: A service with the name '{0}' already exists in the target category.

data.name: ServiceCategoryChangeError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while changing the service category.

data.name: BookingStartTimeMustBeFuture
data.value: Start time must be in the future (minimum 1 minute in advance).

data.name: BookingNotFound
data.value: Booking not found.

data.name: ServiceNotActive
data.value: Service not found or inactive.

data.name: ProviderScheduleNotFound
data.value: Provider does not have a configured schedule.

data.name: ServiceNotOfferedByProvider
data.value: Service not found or not offered by this provider.

data.name: InvalidTimezone
data.value: Provider timezone is invalid.

data.name: ProviderUnavailable
data.value: Provider is not available at the requested time.

data.name: BookingCrossesMidnight
data.value: Bookings cannot cross midnight. Please split into two separate bookings.

data.name: ProviderScheduleDataInvalid
data.value: The provided schedule data is invalid. Check for overlaps or negative times.

data.name: BookingConfirmOnlyPending
data.value: Only pending bookings can be confirmed.

data.name: BookingCancelOnlyPendingOrConfirmed
data.value: Only pending or confirmed bookings can be cancelled.

data.name: BookingCompleteOnlyConfirmed
data.value: Only confirmed bookings can be completed.

data.name: BookingRejectOnlyPending
data.value: Only pending bookings can be rejected.

data.name: BookingModifiedByOtherUser
data.value: The booking was modified by another user.

data.name: ProviderScheduleLoadError
data.value: Failed to process the provider's timezone.

data.name: UserDeleteError
data.value: Failed to delete user.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: UserCreateError
data.value: Failed to create user. Please try again later.

data.name: EmailAlreadyExists
data.value: This email is already in use.

data.name: UsernameAlreadyExists
data.value: Username is already taken.

data.name: TermsAcceptanceRequired
data.value: You must accept the terms of use to register.

data.name: PrivacyPolicyAcceptanceRequired
data.value: You must accept the privacy policy to register.

data.name: RegistrationSaveError
data.value: Failed to save registration. Please try again later.

data.name: FirstNameMinLength
data.value: First name must have at least {0} characters.

data.name: LastNameRequired
data.value: Last name is required and must have at least {0} characters.

data.name: LastNameMinLength
data.value: Last name must have at least {0} characters.

data.name: UserCreateCriticalError
data.value: Critical error creating user. Null data returned.

data.name: UserProfileUpdateError
data.value: Failed to update user profile due to an unexpected error.

data.name: DocumentNotFound
data.value: Document with ID {0} not found.

data.name: HttpContextNotAvailable
data.value: HTTP context not available.

data.name: UserNotAuthenticated
data.value: User is not authenticated.

data.name: UserIdNotFoundInToken
data.value: User ID not found in token.

data.name: DocumentVerificationNotAllowed
data.value: You are not authorized to request verification of this document.

data.name: DocumentStatusInvalidForVerification
data.value: Document has status {0} and cannot be marked for verification.

data.name: DocumentVerificationError
data.value: Error requesting document verification, please try again later.

data.name: DocumentStatusInvalidForRejection
data.value: Document has status {0} and can only be rejected when in Pending Verification.

data.name: DocumentRejectionReasonRequired
data.value: Rejection reason is required.

data.name: DocumentRejectError
data.value: Failed to reject document. Please try again later.

data.name: DocumentDeleteNotAllowed
data.value: You must be authenticated to delete documents.

data.name: AdminOnlyCanDeleteDocuments
data.value: Only administrators can delete documents.

data.name: DocumentDeleteError
data.value: Failed to delete document. Please try again later.

data.name: DocumentApproveNotAllowed
data.value: You must be authenticated to approve documents.

data.name: AdminOnlyCanApproveDocuments
data.value: Only administrators can approve documents.

data.name: DocumentStatusInvalidForApproval
data.value: Document has status {0} and can only be approved when in Pending Verification.

data.name: DocumentApproveError
data.value: Failed to approve document. Please try again later.

data.name: ReviewNotFound
data.value: Review not found.

data.name: ReviewStatusUnsupported
data.value: Status {0} is not supported.

data.name: ReviewOnlyForCompletedBookings
data.value: You can only review providers with whom you have completed bookings.

data.name: TemplateNotFound
data.value: Template not found.

data.name: CityAlreadyRegistered
data.value: City '{0}' is already registered.

data.name: DistanceProviderCountMismatch
data.value: The returned distances do not match the number of providers.
